# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

/**
 * Simple PHP Page Router
 * Routes requests to template files based on $_GET['page'] parameter
 */

// Define the base templates directory (absolute path)
define('TEMPLATES_DIR', realpath(__DIR__ . '/templates'));

if (TEMPLATES_DIR === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><body><h1>500 - Server Configuration Error</h1><p>Templates directory not found.</p></body></html>';
    exit;
}

/**
 * Sanitize and validate the requested page name.
 *
 * @param string $page The raw page parameter from user input
 * @return string|false The validated, safe filename or false if invalid
 */
function sanitize_page_name(string $page): string|false
{
    // Trim whitespace
    $page = trim($page);

    // Reject empty strings
    if ($page === '') {
        return false;
    }

    // Allow only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and forward slashes
    // (forward slashes allow subdirectory organization like "blog/post")
    if (!preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\/]+$/', $page)) {
        return false;
    }

    // Reject any component that is '.' or '..' to prevent directory traversal
    $parts = explode('/', $page);
    foreach ($parts as $part) {
        if ($part === '' || $part === '.' || $part === '..') {
            return false;
        }
    }

    return $page;
}

/**
 * Resolve the template file path and verify it resides within the templates directory.
 *
 * @param string $page The sanitized page name
 * @return string|false The resolved absolute file path or false if invalid/outside base dir
 */
function resolve_template_path(string $page): string|false
{
    $candidate = TEMPLATES_DIR . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $page . '.php';

    // Resolve the absolute path (resolves symlinks, .., etc.)
    $resolved = realpath($candidate);

    // realpath returns false if the file doesn't exist
    if ($resolved === false) {
        return false;
    }

    // Ensure the resolved path starts with the templates directory
    // Use directory separator suffix to prevent prefix attacks
    // e.g., /var/www/templates vs /var/www/templates_evil
    $base_with_separator = TEMPLATES_DIR . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR;

    if (strpos($resolved, $base_with_separator) !== 0 && $resolved !== TEMPLATES_DIR) {
        // The resolved path is outside the allowed base directory
        return false;
    }

    // Ensure it's a regular file (not a directory, device, etc.)
    if (!is_file($resolved)) {
        return false;
    }

    // Ensure the file has a .php extension (double-check after resolution)
    if (pathinfo($resolved, PATHINFO_EXTENSION) !== 'php') {
        return false;
    }

    return $resolved;
}

/**
 * Render a simple error page.
 *
 * @param int $code HTTP status code
 * @param string $title Page title
 * @param string $message Error message
 */
function render_error_page(int $code, string $title, string $message): void
{
    http_response_code($code);
    echo '<!DOCTYPE html>';
    echo '<html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><title>' . htmlspecialchars($title, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</title></head>';
    echo '<body>';
    echo '<h1>' . htmlspecialchars($title, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</h1>';
    echo '<p>' . htmlspecialchars($message, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</p>';
    echo '<p><a href="?page=home">Go to Home</a></p>';
    echo '</body></html>';
}

// --- Main Routing Logic ---

// Default page if none specified
$default_page = 'home';

// Get the requested page from the query string
$raw_page = $_GET['page'] ?? $default_page;

// Sanitize the page name
$page = sanitize_page_name($raw_page);

if ($page === false) {
    error_log('Router: Invalid page name requested: ' . $raw_page);
    render_error_page(400, '400 - Bad Request', 'The requested page name contains invalid characters.');
    exit;
}

// Resolve and validate the template path
$template_path = resolve_template_path($page);

if ($template_path === false) {
    error_log('Router: Page not found or path violation: ' . $page);
    render_error_page(404, '404 - Page Not Found', 'The requested page "' . htmlspecialchars($page, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" could not be found.');
    exit;
}

// Include the validated template file
include $template_path;
